scenarios.capability: Identify unquoted variables and word-splitting risks in a bash script and produce corrected code
scenarios.reason: Agent analyzes provided script text and produces corrected code; no execution required.

scenarios.capability: Detect bashisms in a POSIX sh script and convert them to portable equivalents
scenarios.reason: POSIX compliance analysis and code transformation are purely textual tasks.

scenarios.capability: Identify security vulnerabilities (eval injection, unquoted rm -rf) and produce a secure rewrite
scenarios.reason: Security anti-pattern detection is a static analysis task; output is verified by inspection.

scenarios.capability: Apply the structured four-part response format when reporting multiple validation issues
scenarios.reason: The response format is verifiable from the text the agent produces.

scenarios.capability: Correctly reject a global ShellCheck suppression and replace it with targeted per-line suppressions
scenarios.reason: The agent produces a modified script file whose suppression directives can be verified by inspection.
